name: PT Batulicin Nusantara Maritim Tbk
summary: PT Batulicin Nusantara Maritim Tbk provides sea and river transportation services in Indonesia. It transports goods from the company's tugs and barges to the mother vessel. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Tanah Bumbu, Indonesia. PT Batulicin Nusantara Maritim Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Batulicin Enam Sembilan Transportasi.
